stemHtml: A flight control surface actuator is said to be "irreversible" when…

options.a: the flight control system has an alternate means of control in case of a control jam.
options.b: there is no feedback to the pilot`s controls of the aerodynamic forces acting on the control surface.
options.c: there is a need to lock the flight controls on the ground.
options.d: the pilot does not feel any force when moving that control surface in flight.
